title: Owleaf Playback | Plugin
description: It allows you to play videos, images and gifs.
body:
Owleaf Playback - Plugin is the essential server-side plugin for Owleaf PlayBack to work on Bukkit/Spigot/Paper servers. 

It enables synchronization and management of video, GIF, and image playback for players.

🔹 Features:

✔ Enables video, GIF, and image playback for clients with the mod installed.

✔ Manages synchronization between the server and players.

✔ Compatible with Bukkit/Spigot/Paper.

✔ Commands to control playback and send content to players.

🔹 Commands:

📌 Images & GIFs:

/playbacksticker send <player> <path> <duration> <size> <x> <y>

📌 Videos:

/playbackvideo send <player> <file.mp4>

/playbackvideo stop <player>

⏳ Duration is in milliseconds. To display an image or GIF for 1 second, use 1000.

⚠ Requires players to have the [Owleaf PlayBack mod](Soon) installed on their client.
